text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I arrive at last! The one and only Gold Ship!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Glad to have you on board! We shall sail across
the seven seas and discover the eighth ourselves!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But first, there are quests to complete! And I'll be
banking on ye to look up strategy guides and see
which races drop ship mats!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
